name: Chili Steak
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Rump or round steak, 1 inch
1 1 1/2 cups Texas red or original sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into six servings.
2. Mix salt, pepper, and crushed garlic; season both sides of the steak with the mixture.
3. Let stand in a dish (glass or pottery) for about 1 hour.
4. Pat steaks dry and fry in shortening until browned, turning once. Remove from pan.
5. Cook green pepper and onion in the pan until soft; add chili and coffee.
6. Return steaks to pan; bring to boil.
7. Reduce temperature, cover and cook for 45 minutes.
8. Serve with rice. Makes 6 servings.
There's a lot of good things that chili goes with, or on, or in. Like tortillas. Tamales. Sourdough baking. Cornbread. Beer bread. Texas Toast. Eggs. Hash. Ground beef. Steak. And you can fancy up chili with onions, green peppers, tomatoes, avocado or guacamole, and different kinds of cheese. You get the idea. Chili's not only one of the best eating ideas there ever was, but one of the best for satisfying all kinds of tastes. From "Famous Chile Recipes from Marlboro Country".
